FSM_STATUS_GROUPS

Table for summarizing statuses into groups for easier evaluation.

Columns
fsg_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key.

fsg_fcl_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key, reference to FSM_CLASSES.

fsg_pti_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Translatable item, reference to PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM.

fsg_icon_css (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Optional icon for controlling the display in reports.

fsg_name_css (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Optional CSS class to control report display.

fsg_active (according to `pit_util.flag_type`)

Flag indicating whether the status group is active.

Dependencies
fsg_fcl_id

references FSM_CLASSES (fcl_id)

fsg_pti_id, fsg_fcl_id

references <PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM> (pti_uid, pti_upmg)
